hero.subtitle: From AI-generated assignments to intelligent grading and personalized study planning — unlock the future of education with NitAI.

auth.title: Role-Based Authentication & Access Control
auth.subtitle: Enterprise-grade security for every role — students, teachers, professors, and admins. One platform, seamless access.

cards.title: Student Portal
cards.desc: Secure login with personalized dashboard, enrolled subjects, assignments, and AI-driven study recommendations.

cards.title: Teacher & Professor Portal
cards.desc: Upload syllabus, create AI assignments, track performance, and manage classes with intelligent automation.

cards.title: Role-Based Access Control
cards.desc: Granular permission management — Admin, Faculty, and Student roles with encrypted sessions and multi-factor authentication.

upload.title: Upload Syllabus. Let AI Do the Rest.
upload.subtitle: Teachers upload their syllabus and course preferences. Our AI engine instantly generates structured study plans, lecture schedules, and personalized learning paths for every student.

steps.title: Upload Syllabus
steps.desc: Teacher uploads subject syllabus, reference materials, and class preferences.

steps.title: AI Processing
steps.desc: NitAI analyzes content, structures topics, and builds intelligent curriculum maps.

steps.title: Study Plan Generated
steps.desc: AI creates week-wise study plans, assessment schedules, and content recommendations.

steps.title: Student Receives
steps.desc: Students get personalized learning paths, materials, and AI-curated resources instantly.

assignments.title: AI Creates Your Assessments in Seconds
assignments.subtitle: Based on the uploaded syllabus, NitAI generates topic-wise, weekly, and semester-level assessments — fully customizable with manual interaction.

types.title: Weekly Topic Assessments
types.desc: AI generates focused weekly quizzes aligned to the current teaching progress and syllabus topics.

types.title: Mid-Sem & Half-Yearly Exams
types.desc: Comprehensive examination papers covering multiple units with balanced difficulty distribution.

types.title: Custom AI Assessments
types.desc: Teachers define parameters — AI creates assessments matching exact preferences, difficulty levels, and formats.

highlights: Multiple format support (MCQ, subjective, case study)

performance.title: AI-Powered Performance Intelligence
performance.subtitle: Deep learning analysis of every student's academic journey. AI identifies weak topics, suggests study materials, and generates actionable insights for both students and teachers.

studentFeatures.title: Weak Topic Detection
studentFeatures.desc: AI identifies specific topics where students struggle and recommends targeted study materials.

studentFeatures.title: Study Material Suggestions
studentFeatures.desc: Curated internet resources, articles, and videos aligned to weak areas for self-improvement.

studentFeatures.title: Progress Tracking
studentFeatures.desc: Visual dashboards showing topic-wise improvement over time with AI-generated insights.

teacherFeatures.title: Class Performance Overview
teacherFeatures.desc: Aggregate view of class-wide performance with topic-level drill-down analytics.

teacherFeatures.title: Teaching Suggestions
teacherFeatures.desc: AI recommends topics that need re-teaching based on class performance patterns.

teacherFeatures.title: ML-Based Learning Module
teacherFeatures.desc: Machine learning suggestions to help teachers optimize their own teaching methodology.

features.subtitle: A comprehensive AI-powered ecosystem covering every aspect of modern academic management.
